hungry_effort.question: Do you want to go out, or stay home?

hungry_home.question: Want delivery or something from what you already have?

hungry_delivery.recommendation: Order your go-to comfort food — don't overthink it. You already know what sounds good. Just get that. 🛵

hungry_home_lazy.recommendation: Make a 'chaos snack plate': grab random things from the fridge and pantry — cheese, crackers, fruit, leftovers, whatever — and arrange them on a plate. It feels fancy and takes zero effort. 🧀

hungry_home_cook.recommendation: Pick one thing you've been wanting to try making. Look it up on YouTube, get the ingredients ready, and actually do it. Make it a little event — put music on! 🎶👨‍🍳

hungry_savory.recommendation: Make quesadillas or a quick fried rice with whatever's in the fridge. Both are fast, savory, and satisfying with minimal cleanup. 🌮

hungry_warm.recommendation: Cook some pasta with butter and parmesan, or heat up soup with toast. Simple, warm, cozy, and done in 15 minutes. 🍝

hungry_light.recommendation: Throw together a big salad or grain bowl — whatever greens or grains you have, top with a protein, and drizzle with whatever dressing sounds good. 🥗
